Data.description: Required worksheet. Either row 1 contains machine-readable VariableKey headers, or row 1 contains visual group names and row 2 contains machine-readable VariableKey headers. Each subsequent row is one case.

Case.description: Unique case number used as the default x-axis.

additionalProperties.description: Additional columns must match VariableKey values from the Variables worksheet when that worksheet is present.

Groups.description: Optional worksheet defining display groups. If omitted, built-in groups are used.

Variables.description: Optional worksheet defining variables. If omitted, built-in variables are used.

GroupKey.description: Must match a GroupKey in the Groups worksheet.

xlsxRequirements.groupingModel: Groups are defined in the Groups worksheet. Variables are mapped to groups by Variables.GroupKey. Data columns are displayed under those groups when Data headers match Variables.VariableKey.

dataSheetHeaderRows.ungrouped: Row 1 contains VariableKey headers including Case.
dataSheetHeaderRows.groupedTemplate: Row 1 may contain visual group labels; row 2 must contain VariableKey headers including Case. Visual group labels are for spreadsheet readability only; app grouping comes from Variables.GroupKey.
